name: Delilah Alabaster Table Lamp - 30 Inch Height - TBL4067 - White - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Delilah table lamp, standing gracefully at 30 inches. This alabaster beauty in white adds charm to any room, blending seamlessly with various decor styles. Whether in a modern living room or a cozy bedroom, Delilah brings a touch of elegance and warmth. Its subtle design complements and enhances your interior without overpowering it. The sturdy alabaster material ensures lasting appeal, making Delilah a delightful addition to your home. Transform your ambiance and enjoy the soft, inviting glow that this stunning lamp provides.
